explanation: An aurora dancing above the lake in mid-March, captured in a short timelapse.
title: Aurora over Lake Superior

explanation: The Andromeda Galaxy, M31, our nearest large spiral neighbor, in deep exposure.
title: M31 — The Andromeda Galaxy

explanation: A bright comet sweeps over the mountains of Patagonia before dawn.
title: A Comet over Patagonia

explanation: Sunspot group AR3614 sprawls across the solar disk in this hydrogen-alpha view.
title: Sunspot Group AR3614

explanation: The Pillars of Creation in the Eagle Nebula, imaged by the James Webb Space Telescope.
title: The Pillars of Creation — JWST View

explanation: A panorama from Gale Crater shows layered hills explored by the Curiosity rover.
title: Gale Crater Panorama — Curiosity Mastcam

explanation: An annular solar eclipse forms a ring of fire above the Rocky Mountains.
title: Annular Eclipse over the Rockies

explanation: The winter Milky Way arches over a snow-covered ridge under a moonless sky.
title: Winter Milky Way over the Ridge

explanation: The Orion Nebula, M42, a stellar nursery 1,300 light-years away, in infrared.
title: The Orion Nebula in Infrared

explanation: Jupiter and its Great Red Spot resolved in fine detail during a night of steady seeing.
title: Jupiter and the Great Red Spot

explanation: Saturn's rings cast crisp shadows in this Cassini-archive composite.
title: Saturn's Rings in Shadow

explanation: The Geminid meteor shower streaks across the December sky in a stacked composite.
title: Geminid Meteors over the Desert

explanation: The Horsehead Nebula silhouetted against glowing hydrogen in Orion.
title: The Horsehead Nebula

explanation: A crescent Moon and Venus pair low in the twilight after sunset.
title: Crescent Moon and Venus at Dusk

explanation: The Crab Nebula, the expanding remnant of a supernova recorded in 1054 AD.
title: The Crab Nebula Remnant

explanation: The Andromeda and Triangulum galaxies share a wide-field autumn sky.
title: Two Galaxies of Autumn

explanation: The Lagoon Nebula glows with the light of newborn stars in Sagittarius.
title: The Lagoon Nebula

explanation: The Orionid meteor shower, debris from Halley's Comet, peaks before dawn.
title: Orionid Meteors before Dawn

explanation: A total lunar eclipse turns the Moon a deep copper-red over a city skyline.
title: Total Lunar Eclipse over the City

explanation: Earthrise over the lunar limb, a view from orbit during a recent mission.
title: Earthrise over the Lunar Limb
